prompt:
帮我给这段SQL添加详细注释：

set hive.merge.mapredfiles = true;
insert OVERWRITE table yidun_dw.dws_yidun_corp_basic_info_dd PARTITION (pt_d = '${pre_1day}')
select
    clouduserid,
    corpname,
    membershipgrade,
    industry_flag,
    owner_name
from yidun_ods.ods_yidun_corp_info_dd
where pt_d = '${pre_1day}';
expected_output: 生成带完整文件头注释、参数注释、字段行内注释的格式化SQL

assertions.name: has_file_header
assertions.description: 包含完整的文件头注释块
assertions.check: 输出包含 'Author' 和 'Comment' 以及 '【业务说明】'

assertions.name: has_hive_params_comment
assertions.check: hive.merge.mapredfiles 参数上方或同行有中文注释

assertions.name: has_field_comments
assertions.check: clouduserid, corpname 等字段有 '--' 注释

assertions.name: queries_table_structure
assertions.check: 执行过程中调用了 mammoth_client.py 或 get_table
